scene_summary: A full-bleed artwork for 2026-05-03 derived from the current research field. The model autoresearch pass failed, so the runner fell back to deterministic channel-balanced source ranking. Let the composition follow a block-based structure with organic geometry and a bright brightness profile. let the strongest source-image colors stay saturated and visible rather than muting them follow the source set toward even, open illumination unless the evidence clearly calls for drama balance open space with clustered activity according to the source evidence Embed source-bearing anchors as visible forms that belong naturally to the scene rather than as a literal object inventory or interface mockup.
